_meta.description: 8D problem-solving report template aligned with AS9100D and CQI-20 requirements for structured corrective action

steps.label: Emergency Response Action
steps.label_vi: Hanh dong ung pho khan cap
steps.description: Determine whether an emergency response is needed to protect the customer
steps.description_vi: Xac dinh xem co can hanh dong ung pho khan cap de bao ve khach hang khong

steps.label: Establish the Team
steps.description: Select cross-functional team members with the process and product knowledge to solve the problem
steps.description_vi: Chon thanh vien nhom da chuc nang co kien thuc ve quy trinh va san pham de giai quyet van de

steps.label: Describe the Problem
steps.description: Specify the problem by identifying in quantifiable terms the who, what, where, when, why, how, and how many (5W2H)
steps.description_vi: Chi ro van de bang cach xac dinh dinh luong ai, cai gi, o dau, khi nao, tai sao, the nao va bao nhieu (5W2H)

steps.label: Interim Containment Action
steps.label_vi: Hanh dong ngan chan tam thoi
steps.description: Define and implement interim containment actions to isolate the problem from the customer
steps.description_vi: Xac dinh va thuc hien hanh dong ngan chan tam thoi de cach ly van de khoi khach hang

required_fields.label: Containment Owner
required_fields.label_vi: Nguoi chiu trach nhiem ngan chan

steps.label: Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Identify all applicable causes that explain why the problem occurred and why it was not detected
steps.description_vi: Xac dinh tat ca nguyen nhan giai thich tai sao van de xay ra va tai sao khong duoc phat hien

required_fields.label: Detection Escape Cause(s)
required_fields.label_vi: Nguyen nhan goc thoat phat hien

required_fields.label: Analysis Method(s) Used
required_fields.label_vi: Phuong phap phan tich da su dung

steps.label: Permanent Corrective Actions
steps.label_vi: Hanh dong khac phuc vinh vien
steps.description: Select the best permanent corrective actions to address root cause and escape point
steps.description_vi: Chon hanh dong khac phuc vinh vien tot nhat de xu ly nguyen nhan goc va diem thoat

required_fields.label: Proposed Corrective Actions
required_fields.label_vi: Hanh dong khac phuc de xuat

required_fields.label: Risk Assessment of Actions
required_fields.label_vi: Danh gia rui ro cua hanh dong

steps.label: Implement & Validate Corrective Actions
steps.label_vi: Thuc hien va xac nhan hanh dong khac phuc
steps.description: Implement permanent corrective actions, remove interim containment, and validate effectiveness
steps.description_vi: Thuc hien hanh dong khac phuc vinh vien, go bo ngan chan tam thoi va xac nhan hieu qua

steps.label: Prevent Recurrence
steps.description: Modify management systems, operating systems, practices, and procedures to prevent recurrence
steps.description_vi: Sua doi he thong quan ly, he thong van hanh, thuc hanh va thu tuc de ngan ngua tai phat

required_fields.label: Systemic Preventive Actions
required_fields.label_vi: Hanh dong phong ngua he thong

required_fields.label: Control Plan Updated?
required_fields.label_vi: Ke hoach kiem soat da cap nhat?

required_fields.label: Horizontal Deployment (similar processes/products)
required_fields.label_vi: Trien khai ngang (quy trinh/san pham tuong tu)

steps.label: Congratulate the Team
steps.description: Recognize collective team efforts, document lessons learned, and formally close the 8D
steps.description_vi: Ghi nhan no luc tap the cua nhom, tai lieu hoa bai hoc kinh nghiem va chinh thuc dong 8D

required_fields.label: Effectiveness Review Date (90 days)
required_fields.label_vi: Ngay xem xet hieu qua (90 ngay)
